compiled_state.title: Add worktree.isolation_enabled config key and create shared worktree-dispatch.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Two infrastructure setup items:

1. Add worktree.isolation_enabled=true to .claude/dso-config.conf (default:true)
2. Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md containing:
   - Config check: read worktree.isolation_enabled via read-config.sh
   - When enabled: add isolation: "worktree" to Agent dispatch
   - When disabled: skip isolation parameter (shared-directory fallback)
   - No-commit constraint: sub-agent must NOT commit, run /dso:commit, or raw git commit
   - Git root verification: sub-agent confirms git rev-parse --show-toplevel differs from orchestrator root as first action

### Files to modify
- .claude/dso-config.conf (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md (CREATE)

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exemption — criteria 1+2+3: no conditional logic (config key is static value; prompt is static text), change-detector only, infrastructure-boundary-only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Config key readable
  Verify: bash /Users/joeoakhart/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/scripts/read-config.sh worktree.isolation_enabled | grep -q 'true'
- [ ] Shared prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md
- [ ] Prompt contains no-commit constraint
  Verify: grep -q 'must NOT.*commit\|prohibit.*commit' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md
- [ ] Prompt contains git root verification
  Verify: grep -q 'git rev-parse.*show-toplevel\|git root' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md

comments.body: Fixed: Config key worktree.isolation_enabled=true added, shared worktree-dispatch.md prompt created.
comments.author: Test
